title: Efood – Collect & Go
summary: Built and scaled UI/API automation frameworks to improve test coverage and enable continuous regression testing.
contributions: Designed and implemented scalable automation frameworks using Selenium and Playwright for end-to-end testing
Automated critical user journeys, significantly improving overall test coverage across releases
Integrated automated test suites into Jenkins CI/CD pipelines, enabling continuous and faster regression cycles
Reduced manual testing effort by building reusable components and structured test architecture
Enhanced test reliability and reporting using TestNG, Cucumber, and logging mechanisms
Collaborated with developers and business teams to identify high-risk scenarios and prevent production defects

title: MACH CoGo
summary: Developed automation solutions and CI/CD integrations to modernize testing workflows and improve delivery efficiency.
contributions: Built a Selenium-based automation framework from scratch using Java and Gradle for scalable test execution
Pioneered integration of automation scripts into Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines within the organization
Performed API testing using Postman and validated backend services for reliability and performance
Tested AEM-based frontend components ensuring content accuracy and seamless user experience
Implemented accessibility testing practices to improve application usability and compliance
Created dashboards and reporting mechanisms to track test execution and quality metrics
